events.title: Earth Day Celebration
events.location: Lawrence Hall of Science, Berkeley, CA
events.description: Join community partners and UC Berkeley student organizations for the third-annual Earth Day celebration! Observe crawly critters, explore climate science, step into the shoes of a paleontologist, and enjoy live performances.

events.title: CLIMB Voleon Seminar
events.organizer: Center for the Theoretical Foundations of Learning, Inference, Information, Intelligence, Mathematics, and Microeconomics at Berkeley (CLIMB)
events.location: Hogan Room, Cory Hall (room 521), UC Berkeley
events.description: CLIMB Voleon Seminars address new conceptual and mathematical challenges arising at the intersection of technology, science, and society.

events.title: Class of 2026 Engineering Master's Degree Commencement
events.description: Commencement ceremony for Master's degree graduates of the Class of 2026, their family and friends.

events.title: Class of 2026 Engineering Baccalaureate Degree Commencement
events.description: Commencement ceremony for Baccalaureate degree graduates of the Class of 2026, their family and friends.

events.title: Class of 2026 Engineering Doctoral Degree Commencement
events.description: Commencement ceremony for Doctoral degree graduates of the Class of 2026, their family and friends.

events.title: Post Ramadan Celebration
events.organizer: Muslim Student Association (MSA), ASUC MEMSSA Office, Senator Memon's office, UC Berkeley
events.description: Join in celebrating the end of Ramadan with a market featuring delicious food, local vendors, and crafts.

events.title: Graduate Student Appreciation Patio Party
events.organizer: ASUC Student Union, Graduate Social Club, Grad Division, UC Berkeley
events.description: Bring some friends to our Graduate Student Patio Party and enjoy tasty bites.

events.title: CrafterDark at Anchor House
events.description: A weekly crafting event hosted at Anchor House, providing a space for creativity and community interaction.

events.title: CrafterDark at Anchor House
events.description: Continue your crafting journey at this weekly gathering, fostering creativity and connection among students.

events.title: CrafterDark at Anchor House
events.description: Another opportunity to unwind and create at the weekly CrafterDark event, open to all students.

events.title: CrafterDark at Anchor House
events.description: Join fellow students for an evening of crafting, providing a relaxing break from academic routines.

events.title: CrafterDark at Anchor House
events.description: The final weekly crafting session for the semester, a chance to gather, create, and socialize.

events.title: Movie Night at Headlands - Legally Blonde
events.description: Enjoy a fun movie night featuring the film 'Legally Blonde' for students and campus community.

events.title: Commence Your Career: Connecting Seniors & Alums
events.description: This interactive event connects graduating students with Cal alumni for an afternoon of conversation, connection, and career-building opportunities.

events.title: Drag Bingo
events.description: Get ready for an unforgettable night filled with laughter, prizes, and treats hosted by Thee Leggy Pee.

events.title: Kodiak Robotics MAnalytics Site Visit
events.organizer: Department of Industrial Engineering and Operations Research (IEOR), UC Berkeley
events.description: A company site visit for Master of Analytics students to Kodiak Robotics, offering insights into industry applications.

events.title: 28th Annual Travers Conference on Ethics & Accountability in Government
events.description: This annual conference explores critical issues of ethics and accountability within government.

events.title: Christen Smith | A Blueprint for Freedom: The Black Radical Thought of Beatriz Nascimento (Lecture)
events.organizer: Center for African Studies, UC Berkeley
events.description: This lecture engages with the radical thought and political life of Black Brazilian intellectual Beatriz Nascimento as a blueprint for freedom.

events.title: Christen Smith | Towards a Black Feminist Methodology of Dialogic Translation (Seminar)
events.organizer: Center for African Studies, UC Berkeley
events.location: UC Berkeley Campus (location shared with accepted students)
events.description: A mini-seminar for Berkeley graduate students exploring a black feminist methodology of dialogic translation.

events.title: Conversación: Chile Hoy: una conversación con Javiera Manzi Araneda
events.organizer: Center for Race and Gender, Political Conflict, Gender and People's Rights Initiative (PCRes), UC Berkeley
events.description: This forum will address the shift to the right in Chile following the 2025 presidential elections, reflecting on the contemporary political and social landscape.

events.title: Reading Kashmir: Witnessing as Intervention and the Ban on Books (CRG Forum Series)
events.organizer: Center for Race and Gender, Political Conflict, Gender and People's Rights Initiative (PCRes), UC Berkeley
events.description: A panel discussion on the critical issues of witnessing as intervention and the banning of books in Kashmir.

events.title: Film Screening – “Paris Belongs to Us”
events.description: A screening of one of the seminal films of the French New Wave, with an introduction by Mary Ann Smart, Professor of Musicology.

events.title: For an Inclusive Look at Inclusive Writing
events.description: An event focused on discussions and practices surrounding inclusive writing.

events.title: Félicien Faury | Why Do Voters Support the Far Right in France? A Sociological Perspective
events.location: Library of French Thought, 4229 Dwinelle Hall, UC Berkeley
events.description: Sociologist and political scientist Félicien Faury presents on the complex social dynamics underlying support for the far-right in France.

events.title: Converging or Keeping Distance? Contact Linguistics, Philology and Medieval Literature
events.description: An academic discussion exploring the intersections of contact linguistics, philology, and medieval literature.

events.title: Layli Long Soldier poetry reading
events.location: Morrison Library (inside Doe Library), UC Berkeley
events.description: A poetry reading by Whiting Award and National Book Critics Circle Award winner Layli Long Soldier, followed by a Q&A session.

events.title: Lunch Poems: Tonya Foster
events.location: Maude Fife Room 315, Wheeler Hall, UC Berkeley
events.description: Berkeley's storied noontime poetry series welcomes acclaimed poet Tonya Foster for a reading.

events.title: Layli Long Soldier & Solmaz Sharif: A Conversation
events.location: Maude Fife Room 315, Wheeler Hall, UC Berkeley
events.description: A compelling conversation between award-winning poet Layli Long Soldier and UC Berkeley professor Solmaz Sharif.

events.title: The Loft Hour: Shiben Banerji + Alexandra Lossada
events.location: Hearst Field Annex D23, UC Berkeley
events.description: Elevate your lunch break with Berkeley Arts faculty members Shiben Banerji and Alexandra Lossada, who will discuss their work in an informal conversation.

events.title: Composition Colloquium: Art and Activism with Simone Browne, Cathy Park Hong, Robin D. G. Kelley
events.description: This panel brings together influential contemporary thinkers working at the intersection of art, race, surveillance, history, and political thought.

events.title: Softball: Cal Golden Bears vs. Louisville Cardinals
events.description: Cheer on the Cal Golden Bears softball team as they face the Louisville Cardinals in a home game.

events.title: Softball: Cal Golden Bears vs. Louisville Cardinals
events.description: Catch another exciting home game as the Cal Golden Bears softball team continues their series against the Louisville Cardinals.

events.title: Softball: Cal Golden Bears vs. Louisville Cardinals
events.description: Don't miss the final game of the series between the Cal Golden Bears softball team and the Louisville Cardinals.

events.title: Women's Tennis: Cal vs. Virginia
events.description: The Cal Women's Tennis team competes against Virginia in a home match at the Hellman Tennis Complex.

events.title: Women's Tennis: Cal vs. Virginia Tech
events.description: Watch the Cal Women's Tennis team as they host Virginia Tech in a competitive home match.

events.title: Women's Tennis: Cal vs. Stanford
events.description: A rivalry match as the Cal Women's Tennis team takes on Stanford at home.

events.title: Men's Tennis: Cal vs. NC State
events.description: The Cal Men's Tennis team hosts NC State in a home competition.

events.title: Baseball: Cal vs. Stanford
events.description: Catch the Cal Golden Bears baseball team in a rivalry game against Stanford at home.

events.title: Baseball: Cal vs. Stanford
events.description: Another opportunity to see the Cal Golden Bears baseball team compete against Stanford.

events.title: Baseball: Cal vs. Stanford
events.description: The final game of the home series between the Cal Golden Bears baseball team and their rivals, Stanford.

events.title: Track & Field: Brutus Hamilton Multi-Events
events.description: Witness athletes compete in various multi-events at the Brutus Hamilton competition hosted by Cal.

events.title: Track & Field: Brutus Hamilton Multi-Events
events.description: Day two of the Brutus Hamilton Multi-Events, featuring more athletic performances on campus.

events.title: Track & Field: Brutus Hamilton Invitational
events.description: The Brutus Hamilton Invitational brings track and field athletes to UC Berkeley for a day of competition.

events.title: Agentic AI Summit 2026
events.organizer: Berkeley RDI and Responsible Decentralized Intelligence Foundation, UC Berkeley
events.description: A two-day summit dedicated to Agentic AI, bringing together leaders across the full stack from foundation models to real-world deployment.

events.title: TIE Seminar Presentation (Geoffrey Borchhardt)
events.organizer: Entrepreneurship & Innovation Group, UC Berkeley Haas
events.location: C110 Cheit Hall, Haas School of Business, UC Berkeley
events.description: A seminar presentation by Geoffrey Borchhardt on topics related to entrepreneurship and innovation.

events.title: TIE Seminar Presentation (Samuel Goldberg)
events.organizer: Entrepreneurship & Innovation Group, UC Berkeley Haas
events.location: C110 Cheit Hall, Haas School of Business, UC Berkeley
events.description: A seminar presentation by Samuel Goldberg focusing on current research in entrepreneurship and innovation.

events.title: Cal Day 2026
events.description: Berkeley's spring open house for newly admitted students and their families, featuring events, tours, performances, and more.

events.title: Science Communications Workshop for Scientists
events.description: Learn best practices for science communications and receive 1:1 coaching on your personal pitch from experts.

events.title: Data Visualization Workshop for Scientists
events.description: Explore various tools and tips for creating compelling data visualizations and workshop ideas to support your research.

events.title: Deep Tech Innovation Lab Demo Day
events.organizer: Deep Tech Innovation Lab, UC Berkeley
events.location: UC Berkeley Campus (TBD, Haas School of Business implied)
events.description: A showcase of student innovations emerging from the Deep Tech Innovation Lab.

events.title: Robotics & AI Conference
events.organizer: UC Berkeley Haas (Institute for Business Innovation)
events.location: Spieker Forum, Haas School of Business, UC Berkeley
events.description: A conference focusing on the latest advancements and applications in robotics and artificial intelligence.

events.title: Summer Institute in Competitive Strategy (SCIS)
events.organizer: Institute for Business Innovation, UC Berkeley Haas
events.location: Haas School of Business, UC Berkeley
events.description: An intensive, multi-day program exploring competitive strategy with faculty and industry experts.

events.title: Academy of Distinguished Alumni Banquet 2026
events.organizer: Berkeley Civil and Environmental Engineering, UC Berkeley
events.location: University Club, California Memorial Stadium, UC Berkeley
events.description: An annual gala to induct new members into the Academy of Distinguished Alumni, celebrating achievements in civil and environmental engineering.

events.title: Talking SBIR/STTR Grant Funding: Small Business Research Subcontracts
events.organizer: UC Berkeley Office of Intellectual Property and Industry Research Alliances
events.location: University Club, California Memorial Stadium, UC Berkeley
events.description: A workshop exploring the SBIR/STTR program, UC Berkeley researcher participation, and intellectual property development with this funding.

events.title: IEOR Seminar: Devavrat Shah, MIT
events.organizer: Industrial Engineering and Operations Research (IEOR) Department, UC Berkeley
events.description: A seminar featuring leading-edge research from Devavrat Shah of MIT, an expert in industrial engineering and operations research.

events.title: IEOR Seminar: Stephen Wright, University of Wisconsin - Madison
events.organizer: Industrial Engineering and Operations Research (IEOR) Department, UC Berkeley
events.description: A seminar featuring leading-edge research from Stephen Wright of the University of Wisconsin - Madison, an expert in industrial engineering and operations research.

events.title: IEOR Seminar: Ernest Ryu, UCLA
events.organizer: Industrial Engineering and Operations Research (IEOR) Department, UC Berkeley
events.description: A seminar featuring leading-edge research from Ernest Ryu of UCLA, an expert in industrial engineering and operations research.

events.title: Conference | Islamic Philosophy in the Margins
events.organizer: Center for Middle Eastern Studies, UC Berkeley
events.location: Center for Middle Eastern Studies, UC Berkeley
events.description: A two-day conference exploring various aspects of Islamic Philosophy.

events.title: 2026 David E. Nelson Memorial Lecture
events.organizer: Berkeley Law Executive Education (BCLT), UC Berkeley
events.description: A seminar exploring competition and innovation policy at the intersection of business and law.

events.title: Energy Markets Workshop – Omer Karaduman, Stanford University
events.organizer: Energy Institute at Haas, UC Berkeley
events.location: Haas School of Business, UC Berkeley
events.description: An energy markets workshop featuring insights from Omer Karaduman of Stanford University.

events.title: Energy Markets Workshop – Aaron Smith, UC Berkeley
events.organizer: Energy Institute at Haas, UC Berkeley
events.location: Haas School of Business, UC Berkeley
events.description: An energy markets workshop with contributions from Aaron Smith of UC Berkeley.

events.description: Outside Your Comfort Zone

events.description: International Founder Roadmap: F-1, CPT/OPT & Beyond

events.description: Problem of the Month: Empathy & Ideation

events.title: UC LAUNCH Spring 2026 LAUNCHATHON
events.description: A two-day hackathon weekend event providing workshops and networking for students to help UC LAUNCH Startups build their ideas.

events.title: UC LAUNCH Spring 2026 DEMO DAY
events.description: An event to showcase the pitches from the next wave of entrepreneurs shaping the future through their startups.

events.title: Dissertation Talk: Understanding Misalignment in AI Agents
events.description: A dissertation talk delving into the critical topic of understanding and addressing misalignment in AI agents.

events.title: Topology Seminar: Notes from a search for knots
events.description: A seminar by Jason Deblois (University of Pittsburgh) on details of a successful search for knot complements in S³.

events.title: Connected Data Products Hackdays
events.organizer: Berkeley Institute for Data Science (BIDS) and Englacial, UC Berkeley
events.description: A multi-day workshop bringing together scientists and engineers to collaboratively build open and connected scientific data products for the cryosphere.
